scripts.test: cd playground && bun run playwright test --project=firefox-light --project=chrome-mobile-dark
scripts.test:full: cd playground && bun run playwright test
scripts.test:release: bun run test:full && bun run test:matrix
scripts.playground:setup: fuser -k 4321/tcp || true; fuser -k 4322/tcp || true; cd theme && bun link && cd .. && rm -rf playground && mkdir -p playground && cp -a theme/starter/. playground && cd playground && bun link astro-freelance-persona_theme
